nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate with it throughout a task

nodes.label: AI as skill amplifier
nodes.grounding_span: I could make the program and use my current programming skills to check the program and make corrections

nodes.label: Personal domain reserved for human expression
nodes.grounding_span: writing tasks that are personal, I find I am better at expressing myself than the AI

nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool
nodes.grounding_span: it saved a lot of time processing my data

nodes.label: AI use sanctioned by workplace
nodes.grounding_span: encourages us to use AI to check our work but not to take over the creative and innovative research process

nodes.label: Workplace investment in AI tools
nodes.grounding_span: I think i will rely more and more on it until it is most of my job

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: it saved a lot of time processing my data

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I am better at expressing myself than the AI

nodes.label: Professional growth and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: i consider it, but am not actively working on it

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: it was very satisfying because it saved a lot of time

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I am better at expressing myself than the AI

nodes.label: Mixed feelings about increasing AI reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I think i will rely more and more on it until it is most of my job

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I create a draft on my own, ask for feedback, corrections, or improvements, and iterate from there

nodes.label: Domain-based task allocation — creative vs. mundane
nodes.grounding_span: some tasks I prefer to handle myself, such as math tasks or writing tasks where I need to use personal experience
